verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: Who will be Jesus to him? Who’ll show the love that restores him again? He doesn't need a judge; He needs a friend. Who will be Jesus to him?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: She has a reputation like the woman at the well. The only love she ever knew was the kind she buys and sells, But her thirsty heart is searching for a love that will be true; The Savior cries for her to see Himself in me and you.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Who will be Jesus to her? Who'll show the love that's commanded in His word? Will she see in us the mighty God we serve? Who will Be Jesus to her?

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Wounded People everywhere, And when they look at us, Do they see Jesus there?

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Who will be Jesus to them? Who'll show the love that restores them again? Oh, they do not need a judge; They need a friend. Who will be Jesus to them? Who will be Jesus to them?
